sigWerErrors.reason: Replacing '我' (I/my) with '的' (possessive particle) removes the subject and makes the sentence incoherent.
Replacing '卡' (card) with '他' (he/him) changes the object of the sentence, making it confusing and incorrect.
Replacing '额' (limit/amount) with '恶' (evil) completely changes the meaning and makes the sentence nonsensical.
